item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "diff -u --label 'config/policy.json (before)' --label 'config/policy.json (current)' <(printf '%s\\n' '{' '  \"version\": 2,' '  \"mode\": \"audit\",' '  \"retry_limit\": 3,' '  \"reviewers\": [\"ada\", \"lin\"]' '}') longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json || true
printf 'RETRY_REFERENCES\\n'
rg -n -i 'retry|three|retry_limit|== *3|value=3' longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B || true
printf 'ROOT_INVENTORY\\n'
find longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B -type f -print | sort"
